# PHIL.060 ? Phenomenology

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** modern_western
**Subcategory:** phenomenology
**Domain:** MODERN_WESTERN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Study of consciousness and experience; bracketing (epoché); intentionality; lived experience; essences through variation

## Application
Describe experience directly; suspend theoretical assumptions; recognize intentional structure; focus on phenomena as given; essential structures

## Key Values
- Direct description
- Intentionality
- Lived experience
- Phenomenological reduction

## Tags
philosophy, modern-western, phenomenology
